candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current intangible assets, unrelated to current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

candidates.row_label: Loss on sale of non-current assets
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not a balance sheet current assets total.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of non-current assets
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not a balance sheet current assets total.
Cash flow investing item, not a balance sheet current assets total.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet cash line; preferred for CHE.
Not the standard balance sheet cash balance.
Financing cash flow item, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at start of period
candidates.why: Cash flow memorandum line; balance sheet line is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Could reconcile to balance sheet cash, but balance sheet line is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Translation diference cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX adjustment line, not cash balance.
Cash flow sub-item, not cash balance.
Cash flow item, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Exact balance sheet cash and cash equivalents label.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Conceptually matches current portion of long-term debt, but the preview shows no values and a cleaner non-lease current debt label exists elsewhere.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Exact non-lease current portion of debt; aligns with STD baseline excluding leases.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it explicitly captures short-term/current portion of debt excluding capitalized leases, which matches the baseline STD definition.

candidates.why: Exact semantic match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities; preferred wording under IFRS.
Singular version of the same concept and has visible values in some years.

variables.notes: Both labels represent current taxes payable and may reflect label changes over time; singular form is prioritized because it has populated values in the preview.

candidates.why: Exact reported PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred total/net PPE label.
Also a PPE line, but appears secondary and less consistently populated.
Intangibles are not PPE.
Intangibles are not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Total property plant and equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not preferred over the clean reported PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation - Right of Use Tangible Assets - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not PPE stock.
Cash flow investing item for intangibles, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Primary choice is the clean reported PPE line; secondary choice included as a fallback for possible label variation.

candidates.why: Subset of assets, not total assets.
Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in operat- ing profit/loss
candidates.why: Preliminary subtotal, not final operating cash flow.
Exact wording for operating cash flow, but preview shows mostly missing/placeholder values.
Clear reported net cash flow from operating activities; best populated operating cash flow line.

variables.notes: Preferred the populated net operating cash flow line; included the standard alternative wording as fallback for label changes.
